human_decisions_required: approve or reject RFC-0002's exact lifecycle amendment: lifecycle policy candidates require quantity_max exactly one, lifecycle resources require quantity one, non-lifecycle quantity_max zero remains a constructible empty candidate, and the documented error precedence is normative

confirm that no canonical or durable external policy identity, persisted or activated policy record, accepted transition, or other migration predecessor exists; otherwise require a new schema version and migration rules

approve the bundled pre-alpha Class E source changes: quarantined quote, admission, and raw-hash APIs; exhaustive policy and codec error changes; and diagnostic-format changes with numeric scalars still visible

maintainability_debt: tools/check_architecture.py has 813 physical lines and exceeds the 700-line review trigger; no behavioral counterexample survived, but later decomposition should preserve the pinned projection and rejection tests

the reviews do not approve RFC-0002, authorize merge, or establish release or production readiness
the reviews are not a formal proof, external audit, or proof that all vulnerability classes are absent
unimplemented governed policy, verifier, transition, state, persistence, and commit boundaries remain outside the reviewed implementation
